To identify pericytes, we relied on the expression pattern of known marker genes (Pecam1 for endothelial cells, Rgs5, Pdgfrb, and Cspg4 for pericytes).

Further clustering of an SMC cluster (marker: ACTA2) in the previous study identified three subclusters; ACTA2-expressing cluster as myofibroblasts (MFBs), CNN1-expressing cluster as SMCs, and RGS5- and LBH-expressing clusters as pericytes (Fig. 5B and Supplementary Fig. 12A-B).
